desc: Well-maintained 3 bed, 2 bath bilevel in desirable Tinton Greens. Updated roof, gutters, hot water heater, and vinyl floors throughout. New dishwasher. Sliding door in family room to large backyard with shed.
description:
Well-maintained 3-bedroom, 2-bath bilevel in the desirable Tinton Greens community. This move-in ready home has been thoughtfully updated throughout.

Major mechanicals have all been recently replaced, including the roof, gutters, and hot water heater. New vinyl floors run throughout the home. The family room features a sliding door opening to a large backyard with a storage shed — great for outdoor entertaining or extra storage.
